narrative:
Batavia Township I (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,053 registered voters, with 66.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
